history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed “LEVEL UP!” game interface screen shows a profile card for “Kayz Assisten” with level, experience, and progress details.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a rectangular UI panel displaying “Kayz Assisten” at the top, with a small circular avatar image on the left and multiple stat boxes in the center, including “LEVEL 5” and “EXPERIENCE 10 / 300,” plus smaller counters for “MESSAGES,” “XP NEEDED,” and “NEXT LVL.”

Setting:
The image appears to be a digital interface on a dark background with no real-world setting shown; it looks like a static game or app dashboard, with a subtle purple gradient and soft glow effects.

Visual Details:
At the very top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” is in gold with small diamond-like ornaments on both sides. Below it, a large rounded rectangle panel sits centered on the screen with a faint border. Inside the panel, the name “Kayz Assisten” is in large white text on the upper left/center area, with a small gold pill showing “#1” to the right of the name. In the left column, there is a circular avatar framed by a purple ring, showing a person in a dark outfit with a horned headpiece and long dark hair, standing near a light-colored wall; the avatar details are small and partially obscured by the circular crop. In the main stats area, there are two prominent rounded rectangles: one dark purple box labeled “LEVEL” with a large “5,” and one teal/green box labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “10 / 300.” Beneath them is a horizontal progress bar with a small purple segment at the left and a “3%” label on the right. Below the progress bar are three smaller rounded stat tiles: “MESSAGES 121,” “XP NEEDED 290,” and “NEXT LVL 6.” Near the bottom center of the panel, faint grey text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!”

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayz Assisten
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
5
EXPERIENCE
10 / 300
3%
MESSAGES
121
XP NEEDED
290
NEXT LVL
6
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark, rounded UI panel announcing a level-up and presenting stat information for a user named “Kayz Assisten.” It includes current level, experience progress, a percentage progress indicator, and additional counters for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
